title: Senior Backend Engineer
score_reasoning: Your backend expertise in Python, Go, and distributed systems aligns well with Via's Platform Group focus on scalable infrastructure and microservices. The Senior title and responsibilities (architecture, infrastructure standards, system design) match your current level and career trajectory toward technical leadership. However, the role requires on-site presence 2-3 days/week in NYC, which conflicts significantly with your strong remote-first preference and Berlin base — a >5h timezone mismatch from your ideal overlap window. While the transportation/scale-up domain and AWS/Kubernetes infrastructure work are attractive growth signals, the location constraint is a material blocker for your work setup priorities.

red_flags: Hybrid on-site 2-3 days/week in NYC (>5h timezone offset from Berlin base)
Kubernetes required; your experience limited to Docker
US-based role conflicts with Europe-first location preference
